Description: Clear record supporting AI safety and regulation
Examples: Sponsored AI safety bills, deepfake bans, algorithmic accountability laws, state AI regulation, AI civil rights legislation

Description: Some pro-safety positions alongside anti-regulation stances, or supports AI adoption with limited safeguards
Examples: Backed some safety bills but opposed others; supports military AI + wants guardrails; AI workforce development with no regulatory stance

Description: No documented AI policy positions found
Examples: No bills, votes, statements, or platform positions on AI safety or regulation

Description: Actively opposes AI regulation or safety measures
Examples: Wants to repeal AI safety laws, funded by AI industry PACs to block regulation, embraces unregulated AI, vetoed or killed safety bills
